inputs.label: Focal Length (f)
inputs.businessContext: Focal length of the lens. Positive for converging, negative for diverging.

businessContext_i18n.en: Focal length of the lens. Positive for converging, negative for diverging.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Merceğin odak uzaklığı. Yakınsak için pozitif, ıraksak için negatif.
businessContext_i18n.de: Brennweite der Linse. Positiv für Sammellinsen, negativ für Zerstreuungslinsen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance focale de la lentille. Positive pour convergente, négative pour divergente.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia focal de la lente. Positiva para convergente, negativa para divergente.

inputs.label: Object Distance (do)
inputs.businessContext: Distance from the object to the lens. Positive if on the incoming light side.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance from the object to the lens. Positive if on the incoming light side.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nesneden merceğe olan mesafe. Gelen ışık tarafında ise pozitif.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand vom Objekt zur Linse. Positiv, wenn auf der Seite des einfallenden Lichts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance de l'objet à la lentille. Positive si du côté de la lumière entrante.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia del objeto a la lente. Positiva si está en el lado de la luz incidente.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
